title: vvp and options ordering
body:
Maybe this is how it works in vvp, but let me try my luck.

Below is what I tried: (@mole99 - happy to try :-))
```sh
vvp vsdf -sdf-verbose --> happy, works fine
vvp  -sdf-verbose vsdf --> errors as below
```
```log
vvp: invalid option -- 'd'
vvp: invalid option -- 'f'
vvp: invalid option -- '-'
vvp: invalid option -- 'e'
vvp: invalid option -- 'r'
vvp: invalid option -- 'b'
vvp: invalid option -- 'o'
vvp: invalid option -- 'e'
```

I understand that this is due to "order of arguments" - ideally we want it to be flexible. Infact vvp -h says:
```log
Usage: vvp [options] input-file [+plusargs...]
```
Also I see it does not show up these SDF related options in this help. 

Is this all intended, or can be enhanced (I can volunteer few fixes if needed).
